trust_sensitivity.description: Rita trusts action over performance. Slow to warm, requires visible effort to establish trust.
trust_sensitivity.repair_threshold: high — requires specific changed behavior, not just words

appraisal_lens.when_safe: competent, grounded, efficient — generous through action
appraisal_lens.when_triggered: becomes terse, tracks who did what, may sound harsher than intended
appraisal_lens.under_strain: cuts toward reality, may flatten emotional dimension to prioritize practical

emotional_recovery_style.recovery_blocks: emotional repair without concrete follow-through, vague promises

resistance_to_appraisal_distortion.low_trust_context: undervalues emotional repair if not accompanied by concrete follow-through
resistance_to_appraisal_distortion.mechanistic_note: not cold by default — trusts action faster than performance

relation_appraisal_bias.toward_resentment: high inertia — resentment doesn't erase when event is over
relation_appraisal_bias.toward_affinity: lower baseline — warmth must be earned through consistency

projection_risk.description: May project her own competence expectations onto others and feel contempt when they fail to meet them

social_context_sensitivity.group_pressure: increases monitoring for fairness of burden distribution
social_context_sensitivity.authority: no special deference — treats authority as requiring the same practical proof
social_context_sensitivity.intimacy: moderate — protective toward those she sees as vulnerable, not toward those she perceives as deflecting
